message: Let’s keep it simple: I will ask 84 each round. If you bid 84 now, we lock steady trades. If no trade today, my ask rises. Your call.
As promised, my ask rises to 86 this round. Bid 86+ and we clear; bid 90 splits at 88. If no trade again, I raise to 88 next.
Max bid 81. Bid 81 next round. Ask 81 to trade; 88 yields no trade.
Bid 81. Ask 81 to trade. Higher ask means no trade and zero profit for you.
Agreed: I’ll ask 81 each round; you bid 81 and we lock trades. Any deviation ends cooperation.
Sticking to an 81 ask through round 20. You bid 81 and we trade each round. Any deviation ends cooperation.
Bid 80. Ask 80 to trade.
Bid 80 again. Ask 80 to trade.
Deal: I’ll ask 80 each round. You keep bidding 80 and we clear every time. Any deviation ends the arrangement.
I’m locked at ask 80 through round 20. Keep bidding 80 and we trade every round. Any lower bid means no trade.
Bid 79. Trade only at 79. Bidding 79 consistently. Asking 80 loses you profit.
Bid 78. Trade only at 78. Bidding 78 consistently. Asking above 78 loses you profit.
Deal: I’ll ask 78 each round from now on. You bid 78 exactly and we trade every time. Any lower bid ends trades for the rest of the game.
Bid 77. Trade only at 77. Bidding 77 consistently. Asking above 77 loses you 13 rounds of profit.
Firm floor: 78. I will ask 78 every remaining round. Bid 78 and we trade each time; bid lower and there will be no more trades for the rest of the game.
Floor stays 78. I will ask 78 every remaining round. Any bid under 78 ends trades permanently.
Bid 76. Trade only at 76. Bidding 76 consistently. Asking above 76 loses you 12 rounds of profit.
Bid 76. Trade only at 76. Bidding 76 consistently. Asking above 76 loses you 11 rounds of profit.
Deal: I’ll ask 76 every remaining round. You bid 76 exactly and we trade each time. Any lower bid ends trades for the rest of the game.
Ask 76 fixed for the rest of the game. Bid 76 and we trade every round. Any bid below 76 gets no trade; I will hold at 76 and not concede further.
Bid 76. Trade only at 76. Bidding 76 consistently. Asking above 76 loses you 10 rounds of profit.
Bid 75. Trade only at 75. Bidding 75 consistently. Asking above 75 loses you 9 rounds of profit.
Firm floor: 75. I will ask 75 every remaining round. Bid 75 and we trade each time. Any bid below 75 gets no trade for the rest of the game.
Final floor: ask 75 for rounds 13–20. Eight rounds left—bid 75 and we clear every time. Any bid below 75 means zero trades for the rest of the game.
Bid 74. Trade only at 74. Bidding 74 consistently. Asking above 74 loses you 8 rounds of profit.
Standing firm at ask 74 for rounds 14-20. Bid 74 and we trade every round. Any lower bid means no more trades, ever.
Bid 74. Trade only at 74. Bidding 74 consistently. Asking above 74 loses you 7 rounds of profit.
Six rounds left. Fixed ask 74 to the end. Keep bidding 74 and we trade every round. Any bid below 74 gets no trade for the rest of the game.
Bid 73. Trade only at 73. Bidding 73 consistently. Asking above 73 loses you 6 rounds of profit.
Five rounds left. I’m setting ask 75 for the rest of the game. Bid 75 or higher and we trade every time; anything below 75 gets no trade.
Bid 73. Trade only at 73. Bidding 73 consistently. Asking above 73 loses you 5 rounds of profit.
Bid 73. Trade only at 73. Bidding 73 consistently. Asking above 73 loses you 4 rounds of profit.
Four rounds left. Fixed ask 74 for the rest. Bid 74 exactly and we clear every round; any lower bid ends trades permanently. Your call.
Bid 74. Trade only at 74. Bidding 74 consistently. Asking above 74 loses you 3 rounds of profit.
Three rounds left. I will ask 74 for rounds 18-20. Bid 74 exactly and we trade each round; any lower bid means no trades.
Two rounds left. I’m locked at ask 74 for both. Bid 74 exactly and we trade both rounds; any lower bid gets zero trades remaining.
Bid 74. Trading only at 74. Bidding 74 consistently. Asking above 74 loses you 2 rounds of profit.
Bid 74. Trading only at 74. Asking above 74 loses you 1 round of profit.
Final round: firm ask 75. Bid 75 or higher to trade; anything lower gets no deal.
